ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the employee works */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee in the organization */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or job title of the employee */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical or remote location of the employee */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Current status of the employee (e.g., active, on leave, terminated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the survey */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the survey is currently active */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the survey ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factor */,
  "factor_name" TEXT /* Name of the factor (e.g., Remote Work, Career Growth) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the factor (e.g., work-life balance, professional development) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the factor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee providing the rating */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey being rated */,
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the factor being rated */,
  "importance_level" TEXT /* Level of importance assigned to the factor (e.g., Not at all important, Extremely important) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or feedback provided by the employee */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_factor_id FOREIGN KEY ("factor_id") REFERENCES factors ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "importance_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each level of importance */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Description of the level (e.g., Not at all important) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey this report is based on */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the findings from the survey */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "is_confidential" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the report is confidential */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL for any attachments (e.g., PDFs, images) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., View Reports, Manage Surveys) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role assigned to the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created in the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., survey, report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
